merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Dublin was established when Frederick A. Sterling presented his credentials as American Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: The American Legation in Dublin was established on July 27, 1927, when Frederick A. Sterling presented his credentials as American Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Legation in Ireland was elevated to an Embassy when George Angus Garrett was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials on the same date.

evidence.quote:
George Angus Garrett, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1947-04-10. Credentials presented: 1947-07-28. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1950-04-18.

George Angus Garrett, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1950-03-17. Credentials presented: 1950-04-18. Left post on 1951-05-27.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both CSV and RDCR agree on 1927-07-27 as the date the American Legation in Dublin was established when Sterling presented credentials.

Match. Both agree on 1950-04-18 as the Embassy elevation date. CSV notes reference the Chiefs of Mission page, consistent with POCOM source. RDCR does not appear to provide a separate institutional elevation date, so POCOM's credential/promotion date of 1950-04-18 is the correct date per source priority rules.
